rulings.Case Title: KIMBERLY A BAKER et al VS. FARMERS INSURANCE et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 2, 2011, line 3. DEFENDANT MID-CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's demurrer to the 2nd amended complaint is sustained without leave to amend. The court has provided plaintiff with 2 opportunities to amend the complaint to plead facts to support a cause of action. The court has also told plaintiff to seek assistance at the ACCESS center of Legal Aid Office. Because plaintiff still has failed to amend the complaint to allege a cause of action, the court does not believe that plaintiff will be able to. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: LENA ALBURATI VS. MCDONALD'S, CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 2, 2011, line 4. DEFENDANT RODRICK FOODS, INC'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant's demurrer to the 1st cause of action is overruled. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges intentional physical act that the employer ratified. While some allegations are sloppy or inconsistent, under C.C.P. 452 and Iverson, the cause of action survives. Defendant's demurrer to the 2nd and 3rd causes of action is sustained without leave to amend. Theses sound in negligence (failure to maintain a safe workplace) and do not meet the Iverson exception. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Osc Re Preliminary Injunction And Tro.
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Tuesday, August 2, 2011, line 10. Osc Re Preliminary Injunction And Tro. Plaintiff's motion for a preliminary injunction is denied. First, plaintiff's evidentiary showing is weak. Second, California rejects plaintiff's holder in due course argument. Ferguson v. Avelo Mortgage, LLC (2011) 195 Cal.App. 4th 1618. Third, plaintiff's argument that the mortgage has beed paid is disingenuous. It appears that what plaintiff is saying is that the investor in the P.S.A. recovered what they were owed under that scheme. That is different than having paid the mortgage. The new arguments raised in plaintiff's reply brief are not proper and will not be considered. =(302/LMG)
